notes: v0.14.3 — Hotfix: the wide top profile bar that v0.14.2 broke (invisible but still clickable, because the new texture-based currency draw referenced fields that don't exist inside its heredoc) now repaints correctly via Game.instance.pulse_tex / surge_tex. Tutorial cleanup: removed the Beat Sync / rhythm lesson — the system isn't shipped (sync/rhythm shield was removed in v0.5.2) so the lesson had nothing real to teach. TUTORIAL_TOPICS now has 9 lessons (was 10), remaining lesson numbers renumbered (LESSON 04 = MODES … LESSON 09 = QUESTS). All rhythm branches in the sandbox state machine, objective text, step coach and beat-strip draw removed. Windows only.
